overview: TechMecha Torque IMS is an enterprise intern management platform with three spaces (Org, Marketing, Learning), full CRUD, performance tracking, document management, WhatsApp integration, and a dark-themed branded UI.
features: Intern CRUD with profile picture uploads
Performance tracking with Recharts line charts
WhatsApp deep-link integration with timestamp logging
Advanced intern table with filters, sorting, pagination, CSV export
Dashboard with stats cards, activity feed, quick filters
Internet Identity authentication with 3 admin principals
Mobile-responsive dark theme with TechMecha Red accents
Sample data generation on first load
